chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D251 of 2013: Abdul Raheem Mugherivs. E.D.O. (Education) Kamber & others. For the Petitioner: Mr. A.B.Francis, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr.Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl A.G. Sindh. Dates of hearing: 23.02.2022 Date of announcement: 23.02.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner claims his appointment as a Primary School Teacher (PST) on the basis of having participated in a competitive process in 2008. It is manifest from the record that no application of the petitioner having applied is on record and even otherwise this petition, preferred in 2013 for a cause stated to accrue in 2008, is prima facie barred by laches.In view hereof this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
